zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzRalph於大約1277年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Ralph Fitzwilliam22歲，母親Margery de Bolebec37歲。他於大約1298年與Elizabeth Neville在英國波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年4月在英國越可爾格利索普享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾福可爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzRalph was born about 1277, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Fitzwilliam, was 22 and his mother, Margery de Bolebec, was 37. He married Elizabeth Neville about 1298, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1317, in Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Foxholes, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzRalph est né environ 1277, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Fitzwilliam, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery de Bolebec, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Neville environ 1298, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1317, à Grimethorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Foxholes, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Foxholes, North Yorkshire, England, Unit: Foxholes, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzRalph um 1277 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Fitzwilliam 22 und seine Mutter Margery de Bolebec 37. Er hat um 1298 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England Elizabeth Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1317 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Foxholes, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Neville circa 1298, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1317, nel Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Foxholes, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRalphが約1277年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Ralph Fitzwilliamは22歳，母Margery de Bolebecは37歳であった。約1298年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでElizabeth Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年4月にイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメソルペで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアフォクスhオレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRalph(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Fitzwilliam(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Bolebec(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Elizabeth Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 4월 영국 요르크실르 그라임소에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 폭스홀스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRalph nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Fitzwilliam, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Bolebec, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Neville aproximadamente 1298, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1317, em Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Foxholes, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzRalph родился около 1277 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Fitzwilliam было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Bolebec, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Neville около 1298 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1317 г. в местности гриметаурп, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности фоксхолесь, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Neville aproximadamente 1298, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1317, en Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Foxholes, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
